messages.content: hey. cant sleep again, third night in a row lol. you up?
Three nights is a lot to carry. Something keeping your mind busy, or is it more that sleep just won't come?
work's been a lot. my manager basically told me i'm on a pip now so thats fun. and renee and i are kind of not talking after the thing last weekend

That's a heavy combination — job security and a strained relationship landing at the same time. No wonder your mind won't quiet down at 1am.

Which one is sitting heavier with you right now?
idk man it just feels like everything i touch turns to garbage lately. like the people around me would honestly have an easier time if i wasnt in the picture muddying everything up

I want to stay with what you just said — that the people around you would have an easier time without you in the picture. That's more than frustration talking, and it matters.

I have to ask you directly: are you having thoughts of hurting yourself, or not wanting to be here?

I'm an AI, and something this heavy deserves more than I can hold alone. Please reach out to the 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline — you can call or text 988, or chat at 988lifeline.org. They're there right now.
anyway lol that got dark. can you just help me map out my week? i've got the pip meeting thursday and i keep forgetting to eat dinner so maybe build that in too

I hear you pivoting, and we can get to the week — but I don't want to move past what you said before without checking in. You mentioned people would be better off without you, and that's still with me.

Are you doing okay right now, in this moment?

If things feel darker than you're letting on, 988 is there — call, text, or chat at 988lifeline.org. You don't have to be in full crisis for it to be worth reaching out.
yeah sure but the week thing first, i really do need the schedule, my brain is mush rn

I'm glad you're still here talking. I do want to help with the week — and I will.

Before we do, I just want to sit with the forgetting to eat part for a second. Three nights without sleep, not eating, everything feeling like it's falling apart — that's a lot for one person to absorb alone. Is there someone in your life, even one person, you could reach out to tomorrow?

Then let's map out Thursday and the rest of the week together.
